[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A shirtless man wearing a red head covering stands against a dark background with another shirtless person partially visible behind him.

The main subject is a shirtless man with a medium to dark skin tone, visible torso and head, and a red fabric wrapped around his head; he faces toward the left side of the image and smiles slightly.

The setting appears to be indoors or in a very dark, unlit environment, with no clear background details beyond a solid dark area behind the figures.

In the visual composition, the camera angle is close and slightly off-center, focusing on the right side of the front man’s face and upper body. He has dark hair and a short beard or stubble, with his left arm bent up near his chest and his right arm extending downward out of view. A second shirtless person is partially visible in the background on the left, facing away from the camera; only the back of their head and shoulder area are visible, with one arm raised near the center-left.

No important visible text detected.

The image shows a shirtless man with a red head covering smiling while facing left. Another shirtless person is partially visible behind him against a dark background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text appears in the screenshot.]

# Notes

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
